overall.description: First-person perspective from a truck cabin driving on a wet multi-lane arterial road during a heavy rainstorm at dusk. The vehicle navigates through moderate traffic with active windshield wipers, passes under an overpass, and comes to a stop at a red traffic light behind a large box truck. The footage exhibits the visual characteristics of a driving simulation game with realistic rain physics and vehicle dynamics.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane arterial highway with noise barriers in heavy rain

events.description: passing under overhead electrical catenary wires spanning the roadway
overtaking a white sedan in the left lane while maintaining speed

agents.ego_description: driving steadily on the wet highway with windshield wipers active, maintaining lane position

notable_agents.action: white sedan being overtaken in the left lane
yellow taxi with roof sign driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: tall brown concrete sound barrier wall running parallel to the right side of the road
metal safety barrier with vertical posts along the left roadside
electrical wires suspended on poles spanning across the roadway
tall dual-arm street lamps lining the left side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The truck cruises along a wet multi-lane highway during a heavy downpour at dusk. Windshield wipers sweep continuously across the glass as the vehicle passes concrete noise barriers and metal guardrails. The driver overtakes a white sedan on the left while following a yellow taxi ahead, with overhead electrical wires and street lamps visible against the grey sky.

events.description: passing under concrete overpass bridge structure
braking to slow down for red traffic light visible ahead
decelerating rapidly to stop behind large box truck at intersection

agents.ego_description: slowing down and coming to a stop for the red traffic light at the intersection

notable_agents.action: large box truck with brake lights illuminated stopped at the red light ahead

entered.detail: concrete bridge deck passing overhead with support pillars visible
horizontal metal structure supporting traffic lights over the intersection

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes beneath a concrete overpass as it approaches a signalized intersection. The driver brakes gradually on the wet pavement, slowing from highway speed to a crawl. A large box truck is stopped ahead at the red light, with the traffic signal gantry visible overhead against the darkening sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: stopped at signalized intersection behind large truck

events.description: waiting at red light while observing cross traffic passing through intersection

agents.ego_description: stationary behind the box truck waiting for the traffic signal to change to green

notable_agents.action: large box truck remains stationary with brake lights on at the red light

entered.detail: vertical pole with illuminated red traffic signal facing the camera

segments.scene_description: The truck sits stationary at the red light positioned directly behind a large box truck. Rain continues to fall heavily, creating reflections on the wet asphalt and obscuring the view through the windshield. The concrete noise barrier is now closer on the right, and the red traffic light glows brightly in the gathering darkness while cross traffic moves through the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin as it transitions from cruising along a rain-slicked highway to a complete stop at a city intersection. It begins with the vehicle moving through a heavy downpour at dusk, with windshield wipers sweeping across the glass as the truck overtakes a white sedan and follows a yellow taxi past concrete noise barriers. As the vehicle approaches a signalized intersection, the camera passes beneath a concrete overpass while the truck gradually brakes on the wet pavement. The scene then shifts to a stationary position behind a large box truck, where the red traffic light glows brightly against the darkening sky. Finally, the view settles into the heavy rain, with reflections shimmering on the asphalt and cross traffic moving through the intersection in the gathering darkness.
